beats.narration_text: Selam. A learner asks: build me an interactive simulation of covering rationals: a dense set with measure zero. One Claude prompt. Here is what comes back.

props.command: build me an interactive sim of covering rationals: a dense set with measure zero
output: ✓ Covering Rationals: A Dense Set With Measure Zero

beats.narration_text: Covering Rationals: A Dense Set With Measure Zero is one of those ideas that is easier to see than to state. the core behaviour of covering rationals: a dense set with measure zero. This simulation makes that visible — and every educator can build one.
beats.new_visual_element: Concept card: Covering Rationals: A Dense Set With Measure Zero

beats.narration_text: Here is the prompt. One message to Claude.
beats.code_snippet: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Covering Rationals: A Dense Set With Measure Zero. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: n-slider, eps-slider. Verify: the key behaviour of covering rationals: a dense set with measure zero. Palette: background #FFFFFF, ink #2A1A0E, accent #C8102E.

props.command: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Covering Rationals: A Dense Set With Measure Zero. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: n-slider, eps-slider.

beats.narration_text: Claude returns a single-file HTML. Here is the heart of it — the integrator and the slider handler. No server. No build step. One file, everything in the browser.
beats.code_snippet: // Covering Rationals: A Dense Set With Measure Zero — core physics
beats.new_visual_element: Onda code-block: core JS (integrator + slider handler)
beats.prompt: Show the core physics loop from covering-rationals-intervals.html

beats.narration_text: At the default settings: covering rationals: a dense set with measure zero. Watch what the simulation shows.
Now drag main slider from 1 to 50. Watch the physics respond in real time.
beats.new_visual_element: Slate: narrate slider sweep of main slider from 1 to 50

beats.narration_text: the prediction holds — covering rationals: a dense set with measure zero behaves as the equations say. Exactly as the equations predict.

One prompt. A live demonstration of covering rationals: a dense set with measure zero. For educators: every concept in your course can have one of these. Claude builds it; you judge it; your students explore it.
Open this file in your browser and drag the controls. Or ask Claude to add a second parameter, change the palette, or explain the physics step by step alongside the simulation.
Take this prompt, run it on your own topic. Your turn.
beats.code_snippet: Take this Covering Rationals: A Dense Set With Measure Zero simulation and add a second slider that controls the main parameter. Show how changing it reveals a new aspect of the physics. Keep the single-file format and D3 CDN.
